description.en:
BR074412
 ✨ Fully Furnished – Move-in Ready 100%, complete with a washing machine and refrigerator.
Direct access to BTS Punnawithi (Green [hidden line] convenient travel to Asok, Siam, and other key business districts.
Close to Gateway Ekkamai, The Emporium, Cloud 11, and True Digital Park.
Near Sukhumvit Hospital and several international schools.

Project Facilities

🏊 Swimming Pool
💪 Fitness Center
🌳 Landscaped Garden
💻 Co-working Space
🚗 Resident Parking
The Room Sukhumvit 62, Near BTS Punnawithi

Project Details:  
The Room Sukhumvit 62 by Land & Houses is located on Sukhumvit Road, Soi 62, Bang Chak, Phra Khanong, Bangkok. This high-rise condominium features 2 buildings with 23 floors, offering 487 residential units. The available units range from 1-Bedroom to 2-Bedroom, with sizes starting from 45.00 – 88.00 sq.m. Completed and ready to move in since 2011.

Nearby Landmarks:  
– Gateway Ekamai  
– Major Ekamai  
– Big C Ekamai  
– Central Bangna  
– Lotus On Nut  
– Singapore International School  
– Southeast Bangkok College  
– Sukhumvit Hospital  

Facilities:  
– 10x25 meter ozone system swimming pool  
– Sky garden with seating and BBQ party area on the 3rd fl
